name: ai-cost-calculator-studio
description: A toolkit for building parameterized AI-agent cost calculators. Define your workload as JSON; emit a single-file HTML calculator. Like draw.io, but for LLM cost models.

scripts.test: node scripts/test-engine-smoke.js && node scripts/test-apply.js && node scripts/test-audience-math.js && node scripts/test-derivation-trace.js && node scripts/test-workload-hash.js && node scripts/test-headline-math.js && node scripts/test-archetype-math.mjs && node scripts/test-archetype-growth.mjs && node scripts/test-archetype-agent.mjs && node mcp/test/test-build-opts.mjs && node scripts/test-retry-cache-authoritative.mjs
scripts.mcp:test: for t in mcp/test/test-build-opts.mjs mcp/test/test-engine-bridge.mjs mcp/test/test-validate.mjs mcp/test/test-presets.mjs mcp/test/test-sharelink.mjs mcp/test/test-compute-gate.mjs mcp/test/test-parity.mjs mcp/test/test-protocol.mjs mcp/test/test-e2e-thorough.mjs; do node "$t" || exit 1; done
scripts.pkg:test: cd npm-package && npm pack && cd .. && node scripts/test-packaged.mjs

author: Ajinkya Kulkarni <ajinkya.kulkarni@uah.edu>
